title: Federal Court Blocks Colorado's 70% Enbrel Price Cap
headline: A federal judge halted Colorado's 70% price cap on Amgen's Enbrel, setting a first-of-its-kind precedent on state-level drug price regulation.
key_facts: 70% price reduction mandate; first-of-its-kind case; AMGN +3.55% on July 2

title: Casgevy Approved for Children Ages 2+ with SCD/TDT
headline: FDA approved Vertex/CRISPR Therapeutics' Casgevy (exagamglogene autotemcel) for children ages 2 years and older with sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta thalassemia on July 1, 2026, expanding from prior age-12+ label.
key_facts: Approval date: July 1, 2026; prior approval: December 2023 (age 12+); new label: ages 2+; Orphan Drug, RMAT, Fast Track, Critical Need Pediatric Voucher granted; CRSP +8.09% July 2; Morgan Stanley doubled price target; 90-day return: 12.34%; 1-year return: 7.64%

title: Moderna mFLUSIVA Surges 70% on 9-0 VRBPAC Vote
headline: Moderna's stock rallied more than 70% in one month following a unanimous 9-0 FDA advisory panel vote on June 18 supporting mFLUSIVA (mRNA-1010) flu vaccine, with PDUFA decision set for August 5, 2026.
key_facts: VRBPAC vote: 9-0 on June 18, 2026 (two votes: ages 50-64 and 65+); PDUFA date: August 5, 2026; MRNA +70% in past month, +10% on July 2-3; Wall Street avg price target implies 44% downside; would be first mRNA flu vaccine if approved

title: Orca Bio Sets Tregzi WAC at $428,000
headline: Orca Bio announced a wholesale acquisition cost (WAC) of $428,000 for Tregzi, its novel regulatory T cell-based therapy for blood cancer patients requiring transplants, following FDA approval on July 1, 2026.
key_facts: WAC: $428,000; FDA approval: July 1, 2026; Tregzi is regulatory T cell-based therapy for blood cancer transplant patients

title: Broad Pharma Rally Led by Large-Cap Stocks
headline: Major pharmaceutical stocks rallied broadly on July 2, with JNJ (+3.57%), ABBV (+3.99%), MRK (+3.34%), GILD (+4.21%), and ISRG (+5.87%) leading gains as healthcare outperforms S&P 500 YTD by 310 basis points.

title: Celea Raises $180M as PureTech Spinout for IPF
headline: Celea, a PureTech Health spinout focused on idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF), closed an $180 million funding round.
key_facts: $180M funding; focus: idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF); PureTech spinout (prior spinouts: Karuna acquired by BMS for $14B; Seaport)

title: Sarepta DMD Drugs PDUFA Set for February 2027
headline: FDA set a February 28, 2027 PDUFA date for Sarepta's Amondys 45 and Vyondys 53 to convert from accelerated approval to full approval.
key_facts: PDUFA date: February 28, 2027; drugs: Amondys 45 and Vyondys 53; conversion: accelerated approval to full approval

title: Sanofi Sarclisa SC Review Extended to July 23
headline: FDA extended its review of Sanofi's subcutaneous formulation of Sarclisa to July 23, 2026, pushing back the original PDUFA date.
key_facts: New PDUFA date: July 23, 2026; subcutaneous Sarclisa formulation under review
